questions.html:
What numbers are included in this range?
range(1, 10)
questions.notice: range(1, 10) starts at 1 and stops BEFORE 10

questions.html:
What numbers are included in this range?
range(0, 5)
questions.notice: range(0, 5) starts at 0 and stops BEFORE 5

questions.html:
What numbers are included in this range?
range(5)
questions.notice: range(5) with one argument always starts at 0 and stops BEFORE 5

questions.html:
What numbers are included in this range?
range(3, 8)
questions.notice: range(3, 8) starts at 3 and stops BEFORE 8

questions.html:
What numbers are included in this range?
range(0, 10, 2)
questions.notice: range(0, 10, 2) starts at 0, stops BEFORE 10, counting up in steps of 2

questions.html:
What numbers are included in this range?
range(1, 10, 3)
questions.notice: range(1, 10, 3) starts at 1 and adds 3 each time: 1, 4, 7 — then 10 would be reached but 10 is excluded

questions.html:
How many numbers are in this range?
range(0, 100)
